/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/physsim_7_sph.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../bin/physsim_7_sph  ../../lib/libphyssim_common.a ../../lib/libvislab_opengl.a ../../lib/libvislab_graphics.a ../../lib/libvislab_geometry.a ../../lib/libvislab_field.a ../../lib/libvislab_core.a ../../_deps/glew-build/lib/libglew.a -framework OpenGL -framework AGL ../../lib/libimgui.a ../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework QuartzCore
